plugins.name: ddaa
plugins.description: Bilingual skills — briefing, handoff, preflight validation, structured proofreading, and skill creation.

plugins.name: edify
plugins.description: Opinionated agent framework for Claude Code

plugins.name: handoff
plugins.description: Pre-/clear task snapshot for Claude Code: agent notes current task + open decisions, a Stop hook composes them with auto-extracted last-N user prompts and files touched from the session JSONL.

plugins.name: gitmoji
plugins.description: Commit-msg git hook that replaces conventional-commit prefixes (feat:, fix:, docs:, ...) with gitmoji emojis. Ships an installer command that stows the hook into the current git repo.
